'''zhatowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadroller|roadroller]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-t-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadroller|roadroller]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhatowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæteweth|zhæteweth]] || [[word:zhætewej|zhætewej]] || [[word:zhætewesh|zhætewesh]] || [[word:zhætewe|zhætewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhatotowoth|zhatotowoth]] || [[word:zhatotowoj|zhatotowoj]] || [[word:zhatotowosh|zhatotowosh]] || [[word:zhatotowo|zhatotowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhatowoth|zhatowoth]] || [[word:zhatowoj|zhatowoj]] || [[word:zhatowosh|zhatowosh]] || [[word:zhatowo|zhatowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhatofwoth|zhatofwoth]] || [[word:zhatofwoj|zhatofwoj]] || [[word:zhatofwosh|zhatofwosh]] || [[word:zhatofwof|zhatofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhatowotho|zhatowotho]] || [[word:zhatowojo|zhatowojo]] || [[word:zhatowosho|zhatowosho]] || [[word:zhatowoko|zhatowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhatowoth|zhatowoth]] || [[word:zhatowoj|zhatowoj]] || [[word:zhatowosh|zhatowosh]] || [[word:zhatowo|zhatowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhatowothol|zhatowothol]] || [[word:zhatowojol|zhatowojol]] || [[word:zhatowoshol|zhatowoshol]] || [[word:zhatowokol|zhatowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhatowothotho|zhatowothotho]] || [[word:zhatowojojo|zhatowojojo]] || [[word:zhatowoshosho|zhatowoshosho]] || [[word:zhatowoko|zhatowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhatowothon|zhatowothon]] || [[word:zhatowojon|zhatowojon]] || [[word:zhatowoshon|zhatowoshon]] || [[word:zhatowokon|zhatowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhatowothoro|zhatowothoro]] || [[word:zhatowojoro|zhatowojoro]] || [[word:zhatowoshoro|zhatowoshoro]] || [[word:zhatowokoro|zhatowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
